_note: UK TV broadcaster map (brief feature 1). API-Football does not carry the UK broadcaster, so it is hand-kept here from the OFFICIAL BBC/ITV published schedules. NEVER put a guessed/placeholder channel here: if a real fixture is not in this map the app shows nothing for it, which is correct. Real group fixtures are intentionally UNMAPPED until the official schedule is transcribed.
_keys: Group games resolve by fixture id (fixtures{}) first, then by HOME-AWAY team matchup (byTeams{}). Knockout ties resolve by slot, e.g. R32-M73 (knockout{}).
_dev: The fixtures{} entries below are LOCAL-DEV demo keys (mock fixture ids like mA1/f2). They can never match production, where matches carry real API-Football ids, so they only light up the feature when running against the local mock snapshot.
